verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My self do not tire, my spirit praise the Lord He promised he will do it, trust in the Lord His promises are forever, if he promises he will do it My spririt my self, trust in the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As the rain pours, from heaven on earth So his words from his mouth, will not return in vain It will accomplish his will, it will do as he says If he promises he will do it, trust in the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His thoughts are not ours, his ways are not like ours As the heavens are above, his thoughts are great He will instruct his mercies, his song to me at night Do not despair do not falter, trust in the Lord
